lines.speaker: Shipwright Sam
lines.text: Greetings! What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. What do you do around here?

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sam
lines.text: I'm a shipwright. I supply boats of all kinds to anyone with the money to afford them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting... Would I be able to buy one?

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sam
lines.text: Sorry, but I don't have any ready for sale right now. I'm sure I will soon, so keep checking back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, fair enough.

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sam
lines.text: Greetings! What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. What do you do around here?

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sam
lines.text: I'm a shipwright. I supply boats of all kinds to anyone with the money to afford them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting... Would I be able to buy one?

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sam
lines.text: Sorry, but I don't have any ready for sale right now. I'm sure I will soon, so keep checking back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, fair enough.

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sam
lines.text: Greetings! What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to buy a new boat.

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sam
lines.text: Of course! Which one would you like?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to customise a boat.

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sam
lines.text: Not a problem. Just let me know which boat you want to customise and I'll get things set up for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to retrieve a boat.

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sam
lines.text: Certainly! Let me know which boat you want retrieving and I'll call in a port wizard to teleport it over.

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sam
lines.text: That boat currently docked at [boat location]. It'd normally cost [x] coins for retrieval but I'll waive the cost this time since I'm in a good mood.

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sam
lines.text: That boat is lost at sea. A port wizard would normally retrieve it for you for [x] coins but I'll waive the cost this time since I'm in a good mood.

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sam
lines.text: Right, time to call in the port wizard.

lines.speaker: Port Wizard Perrie/Peter/Petra
lines.text: Another retrieval? This won't take long...

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sam
lines.text: All done! The boat is now docked here at [location].

lines.speaker: Port Wizard Perrie/Peter/Petra
lines.text: Need a retrieval? One moment please...

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sam
lines.text: All done! The boat is now docked here at [location].

lines.speaker: Port Wizard Perrie/Peter/Petra
lines.text: Retrieval is it? Right, give me a moment...

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sam
lines.text: All done! The boat is now docked here at [location].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, but I'm not paying that.

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sam
lines.text: Fair enough. Come back if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing, thanks.

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sam
lines.text: Fair enough.

sections.title: Trading, customise-boat, or retrieve-boat before Sailing release

lines.speaker: Shipwright Sam
lines.text: I'm afraid I can't help you with that at the moment. You'll have to come back later.
